issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' (opponent attacks you), not 'OnAttacked'. 'OnAttacked' implies your card was attacked.
Condition checks for 'Baroque Works' card on board, but effect requires Leader's type to include 'Baroque Works'. Should use 'LeaderHasType' condition with value 'Baroque Works'.
Duration should be 'DuringOpponentTurn' (opponent's attack), not 'EndOfBattle'. Text states 'during this battle' which occurs on opponent's turn.
'Once Per Turn' limiter not encoded in DSL. Should add 'limitation' field if DSL supports it, or note as missing metadata.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Your Opponent's Attack] [Once Per Turn] DON!! −1: If your Leader's type includes "Baroque Works", up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +2000 power during this battle.
